untranslatable_reason: This is a fundamental-based factor strategy requiring 5-year weighted average sales growth ranking across the stock universe. The entry conditions depend on: (1) calculating 5-year weighted average sales growth from financial statement data, (2) ranking all stocks by this metric, and (3) forming decile portfolios. None of these operations are supported by the allowed technical indicators (price, volume, moving averages, oscillators, etc.). The strategy requires access to historical sales data and cross-sectional ranking capabilities not available in a price-based backtest engine.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_227016_18 is a contrarian/reversion factor strategy based on fundamental sales growth metrics, not technical price indicators. A proper implementation would require: (a) a fundamental data provider with 5-year sales history, (b) portfolio construction logic to form decile groups, and (c) cross-sectional ranking across the investment universe. This cannot be translated into technical indicator conditions.
